description_long: This is a rounded ceramic cup with a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The cup is light beige in color and features the name 'Martha' prominently displayed in a stylized, blue script within an oval on the front. The name 'MARTHA' is also vertically printed in large, block letters along one side of the cup. The surface appears matte and smooth, with no visible gloss or shine. The cup is open at the top, with a wide mouth suitable for holding beverages, and the interior is likely hollow and similar in color to the exterior.
description: A beige ceramic cup with a handle and the name 'Martha' in blue script and block letters on its surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and 'Martha' in blue script within an oval.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: Front-left angle showing the handle on the left and the 'Martha' script visible.
description_view_3: Side view with 'MARTHA' in large block letters vertically along the cup's surface.
